The '''''G Cat''''' was a modified [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd]] [[Helix-class light interceptor|''Helix''-class light interceptor]] owned by [[Cryle Cavv]]. With the help of [[R2-RC]], [[Gender/Legends|he]] claimed it was a simple [[Transport/Legends|transport]], although it had a military background. He armed the ship with four [[Plasburst laser cannon/Legends|plasburst laser cannon]]s and two [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers to defend against unwanted company.

==History==
The ''G Cat'' was used by Cavv and [[Quillin Arkell]] on a mission to extract [[Rivoche Tarkin]] from [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] before her cover was blown. After rescuing the spy, Cavv had his droid pilot the ''G Cat'' to the top of the [[Royal Galaxy Hotel]] so the group could get off the planet. Using the ''G Cat''{{'s}} speed and agility, Cavv was able to avoid Imperial ships trying to capture him and escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="SF" />
